Video.summary: A miner and an assayer try to short-circuit a mine owner's plans to corner the market.
Video.title: The Red Flannel Shirt

Video.summary: Gambler Brad Forrester meets a formidable opponent in schoolteacher Ruth Stewart.
Video.title: The Gambler and the Lady

Video.summary: Jim Bridger returns from an Army assignment to learn his life at home has changed drastically.
Video.title: Old Gabe

Video.summary: An American couple becomes involved in Benito Juarez's revolt against Emperor Maximilian of Mexico.
Video.title: A Town Is Born

Video.summary: Innocent John Studebaker's high hopes are quickly punctured when he loses his wagon and his savings.
Video.title: Wheelbarrow Johnny

Video.summary: A horsewoman puts a dent in a circus owner's plans to hire another equestrienne.
Video.title: Pioneer Circus

Video.summary: A homesteader runs afoul of a cattleman.
Video.title: Old Blue

Video.summary: After a skirmish with hostile Natives, prisoners arrive at the fort, including an ill girl.
Video.title: Indian Emily

Video.summary: Steve Hewitt accidentally kills the dogs of miner Tully and is haunted by his mistake.
Video.title: Dogs of the Mist

Video.summary: America's first female judge loses her life savings and her husband in a fight against corruption.
Video.title: A Woman's Rights

Video.summary: Townspeople plan a vendetta when a Mexican outlaw is accused of killing four miners.
Video.title: Eagle in the Rocks

Video.summary: A singer wants to give up the fame and return home.
Video.title: Emma Is Coming

Video.summary: Indians attack on a wedding night.
Video.title: Pete Kitchen's Wedding Night

Video.summary: On a peace mission, a rancher and a Native meet a prospector who thinks they're after his gold.
Video.title: Mission to the Mountains

Video.summary: A former prospector is hired by a young woman to find her fiancé, who became lost in the mountains.
Video.title: Somewhere in the Vultures

Video.summary: A teacher steps in when an outlaw influences a youngster.
Video.title: Learnin' at Dirty Devil

Video.summary: As the Donner Party attempts to cross the Sierra Nevada Mountains, and the Reed family is banished.
Video.title: A Girl Named Virginia

Video.summary: Matt Denby faces severe bad luck: his son is bitten by a rabid animal and his wife leaves him.
Video.title: The Madstone

Video.summary: A ghost-plagued woman hires a detective to take her and her fortune to San Francisco.
Video.title: South of Horror Flats

Video.summary: A tenderfoot teams with a prospector who is quick to live up to his reputation as a jinx.
Video.title: Gamble with Death

Video.summary: Lawyer William Thorne defends an innocent woman threatened by bigotry and mob violence.
Video.title: Death Ride

Video.summary: A Navy officer mapping the Missouri River encounters a struggle between Indians and the Army.
Video.title: Sailor on a Horse

Video.summary: The end of the Mexican-American War leads to disputes between land-owning families and new settlers.
Video.title: Perilous Refuge

Video.summary: Buff McCloud runs a Nevada town with an iron fist - until a stranger arrives.
Video.title: Forty Steps to Glory

Video.summary: A miner discovers a vein rich in ore near his claim after giving half of his stake to a singer.
Video.title: Ten Feet of Nothing

Video.summary: A vagabond finds stolen riches and becomes a philanthropist.
Video.title: Money to Burn

Video.summary: A newspaperman receives permission to accompany Gen. Custer's troops as they go to war with Sioux.
Video.title: The Great Lounsberry Scoop

Video.summary: Townspeople unite against a couple who refuse to carry guns and fight.
Video.title: Devil's Bar

Video.summary: An inexperienced young man hears about a planned ambush on the sheriff and vows to help.
Video.title: The Friend

Video.summary: Two Americans on their way to Santa Fe are captured by Mexican troops and held prisoner.
Video.title: Bread on the Desert

Video.summary: A miner invests his life savings on a tip from a dying criminal.
Video.title: The Secret of the Black Prince

Image.alt: The Secret of the Black Prince
The Secret of the Black Prince
The Secret of the Black Prince
The Secret of the Black Prince
The Secret of the Black Prince
The Secret of the Black Prince
The Secret of the Black Prince
The Secret of the Black Prince
The Secret of the Black Prince

Video.summary: A woman's love inspires an aspiring preacher to stand up to a bully.
Video.title: The Other Cheek

Video.summary: A teacher engaged to a minister tries to conceal her gambling.
Video.title: Lottie's Legacy

Video.summary: A set of circumstances prevent friends from keeping control of their potential millions.
Video.title: Ten Day Millionaires

Video.summary: A former outlaw takes the unenviable job of sheriff in a lawless town, and old habits die hard.
Video.title: A Restless Man

Video.summary: John Parker was raised by Comanches since he was a boy and wants to remain with his Native family.
Video.title: The Understanding

Video.summary: A blue-eyed goat named Billy and a mother's ability to bake biscuits help abandoned family members.
Video.title: Biscuits and Billy the Kid

Video.summary: A physician courts disaster by aiding one of two feuding Natives.
Video.title: The Lady Doctor

Video.summary: A young woman flirts with a ranch hand while waiting for a proposal from her beau.
Video.title: Pioneer Pluck

Video.summary: Wagon master Caleb must bring his wayward son Johnny to justice after the boy goes too far.
Video.title: A Simple Question of Justice

Video.summary: A loveless woman baker decides to leave, causing her town to lose its only pie supplier.
Video.title: The Solid Gold Pie

Video.summary: John Clum is given a task of turning a group of Apache men into a force that aids the U.S. Calvary.
Video.title: Clum's Constabulary

Video.summary: Rachel Barrett's act of kindness toward an injured Native leads to her family's capture.
Video.title: A Gift
